rootCause.summary: ECS services started before the first Secrets Manager version and AWSCURRENT stage existed
rootCause.configurationGap: Terraform resource dependency did not guarantee that the secret value version existed before Backend and Worker startup

timeline.event: Secret shell created without a value version
Worker and Backend task startup failures began
Worker and Backend deployment circuit breakers failed
PutSecretValue created the first AWSCURRENT version
Backend and Worker force-new-deployment calls verified
Worker and Backend reached steady state

crossValidation.agentCouldNotDetermine: The actor that initiated the recovery deployment

operationalPolicy: Agent investigation -> evidence review -> CloudTrail and operations-log cross-check -> human approval
